results.title: WD’s compact 2TB portable SSD hits its lowest price since the hike at $200 (Reg. $310)
results.description: Woot is now offering the 2TB Western Digital Elements SE portable SSD for $199.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). That’s down from the $310 price this model has been fetching at Amazon lately, knocking just over $110 off for roughly 35% in savings. While it regularly sold closer to $125 until November of last year, storage pricing has steadily climbed since then, with this particular model eventually reaching the $300 range. Today’s Woot deal marks the lowest price we have tracked since that hike, making it a notable chance to score a compact 2TB portable SSD for far less than the usual rates these drives have been fetching lately. Head below for more details.
